Panini · Lunch
Smoked Chicken Panini
Toasted panini with smoked chicken, sharp cheddar, caramelised onions and Dijon mayonnaise on rustic bread
FJD$32
Price
1×
Portions
5 min
Prep
4 min
Cook
Lunch
Service
Ingredients
IngredientUnitQty
Bread
Rustic bread, slicedslices2
Protein
Smoked chicken, slicedg100
Filling
Sharp cheddar, slicedg40
Caramelised onionsg30
Sauce
Dijon mayonnaiseg20
Method
1
Spread Dijon mayo on one inner face of both bread slices.
2
Layer smoked chicken, cheddar, and caramelised onions.
3
Close sandwich. Press in panini grill 3–4 min until golden and cheese melts.
4
Cut on diagonal. Plate with fries.
Plating Notes
Cut on diagonal. Cheese melt visible at cut. Fries alongside.
Equipment
Panini press · Bread knife
Allergens
GLUTEN DAIRY EGGS MUSTARD
